title: mimulus tilingii var. corallinus
intro: Mimulus tilingii var. corallinus, also known as Corallinus Monkey Flower, is a plant species native to China and parts of Asia, characterized by its distinctive red flowers with yellow markings. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Corallinus Monkey Flower is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Mimulus tilingii var. corallinus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
